name: PS Business Parks, Inc.
description: PS Business Parks, Inc. is a publicly traded real estate investment trust (REIT) that specializes in the acquisition, development, ownership, and operation of commercial properties. The company focuses primarily on multi-tenant industrial, industrial-flex, and low-rise suburban office spaces. With a strong emphasis on property management, leasing, and strategic development, PS Business Parks provides essential workspace solutions for a diverse range of businesses. Headquartered in Glendale, California, the firm maintains a significant portfolio of commercial real estate assets across various key markets in the United States, supporting its position as a prominent player in the commercial property sector.
